name: potion-brewery-full-stack-challenge
description: The Bubbling Cauldron Full Stack Challenge

scripts.setup: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.setup:python: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend-python && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup:dotnet: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend-dotnet && dotnet restore
